text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #1)

I'll try that once my current poudriere build completes (later today or tomorrow).  I noticed this problem because the default samba was updated from 4.4 to 4.6, so if 4.7 is considered far superior to 4.6, will that soon become the default?
